item.title: Yeongbeon Song
item.description:
Research Software Engineer

B.S in Software & Computer Engineering, Ajou University (Expected in Feb. 2027).

Research topic:
Ubiquitous and Distributed Systems, Human‑Centered Embedded & IoT Systems, Resource‑Constrained Embedded Optimization

Education

  • Ajou University
    • B.S. in Software & Computer Engineering
    • 2022.03 - 2027.02 (Expected)
  • Software Maestro
    • 12th Trainee
    • 2021.02 - 2022.01
  • Sunrin Internet High School
    • Diploma in Software Department
    • 2017.03 - 2020.02

Work Experience

  • Defense Integrated Data Center (MND)
    • Security & System Operator (Mandatory)
    • 2024.07 - 2026.02
  • Vestella Lab
    • Intern Researcher
    • 2023.12 - 2024.05
  • EY Labs
    • Founder & Software Architect
    • 2022.04 - 2024.05
